The '''Abran system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] which contained the [[Abran asteroid belt|Abran belt]]. It was sometimes called the '''B'Knos system''' after the colony [[B'Knos]] in the asteroid belt.

==History==
It was [[Raid on B'Knos colony|attacked]] by the [[Ssi-ruuvi]] when they invaded neighboring systems.<ref name="CSWE" />

{{System-stub}}
